race.description: Hkjc World Pool Liverpool City Cup (G3)
race.comment: AXIUS (9) exciting gelding who looks to get the fast tempo again after finishing over the top of them at the big odds in the M M Snippets at the Gold Coast on January 17. Kept up to the mark with a 1200m trial placing and even better placed over the 1300m. Go close. KING OF ROSEAU (7) won on the same card as AXIUS when he swooped late to salute in a tight finish over 1400m in the LR Magic Millions Cup at the Gold Coast. Since fitted with a trial placing over 1000m. Look for him launching late. WILLAIDOW (5) accomplished sprinter who pulled out plenty on resumption with a game nose win over 1200m in the G3 Southern Cross Stakes at Rosehill. Fitter for latest trial placing over 795m. Adept in all conditions and clearly come back well. THE INSTRUCTOR (3) outclassed with a fading fourth over 1400m in the G2 Apollo at this track fourth-up. Can slide across from the draw and finish in the minor money. COAL CRUSHER (1) improver second-up who stays in the mix.
